days.title: Introduction to Space Exploration
presentation_phrases: Let's begin with an overview of...
Moving on to our next point...
days.learning_objective: Understand the history and significance of space exploration
days.story_guidance: Create a story about the early days of space exploration

days.title: The Solar System
days.learning_objective: Learn about the planets and other objects in our solar system
days.story_guidance: A story about a journey through the solar system

days.title: Modern Space Technology
days.learning_objective: Understand the technology that enables space exploration
days.story_guidance: A story about the development of a new space technology

days.title: The Future of Space Exploration
days.learning_objective: Explore future possibilities in space exploration
days.story_guidance: A story about the first human colony on Mars

days.title: Life in Space
days.learning_objective: Understand the challenges and realities of living in space
days.story_guidance: A day in the life of an astronaut on the International Space Station
